perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse aisle where a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown jacket over a checkered dress, holds several nutcracker-themed chocolate tins. (2) As she speaks, the camera cuts between medium shots of her holding the products and close-ups of specific tin designs including a 'Mouse King' and 'Nutcracker Prince'. (3) A male hand enters the frame occasionally to point at the lids or give a thumbs-up. (4) The woman rotates the tins to show the 360-degree graphics while standing in front of stacked pallets of seasonal merchandise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic, and high-tempo BGM plays continuously. A female voice begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting and product introduction. (2) A male voice (off-screen) joins the conversation in a friendly and humorous tone, creating a duo-commentary style. (3) Occasional 'pop' or 'twinkle' SFX are heard coinciding with text overlays. (4) The audio ends with the sound of both individuals laughing as they conclude the review.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '義大利製造 459元!' (Made in Italy 459 NTD!) - Functional text highlighting price and origin. (2) '胡桃鉗金泰穀物牛奶巧克力' (Nutcracker Cereal Milk Chocolate) - Product name identifying the item. (3) '459元裡面有350克' (459 NTD for 350g) - Functional weight information. (4) '很節慶氛圍' and '氛圍滿滿' (Great festive atmosphere) - Decorative hook text used to convey emotional value.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Showcase -> Humorous Commentary -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator onscreen, 1 male hand visible off-camera
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long dark hair wearing a beige/brown jacket and a white/brown checkered skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse retail environment with tall shelves, stacked pallets of products, and bright industrial lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to drive sales and awareness for a specific holiday-themed chocolate product at Costco. It leverages the visual appeal of the collectible tins and the low price point to attract shoppers looking for Christmas gifts or decorations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration within a specific retail store (Costco) with price disclosure.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: On-screen variety-style captions and high-pitched vocal energy common in Taiwanese retail vlogging.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'cuteness' factor of the packaging and childhood nostalgia (mentioning Barbie) to build an emotional connection with the audience.
